user_story: As an author, I can add a cover image URL when editing an article, and readers can see the cover image on the article detail page.
acceptance_criteria: Article model or serializer can persist a cover image URL.
Article create/update API accepts cover image data.
Editor page exposes a cover image URL input.
Article detail page displays the cover image when present.
Existing article creation and rendering flows continue to work.
constraints: Do not modify secrets, .env files, or lockfiles.
Keep database/schema changes explicit in the patch plan.
